name: Synup vs Zoho Publish
hero_main_title: A Superior ZohoPublish Alternative – Get More for What You Pay
hero_summary: Why settle with a small-scale solution for your local marketing when Synup can help you 10x your local presence? With double the publisher networks, double the feature set, and double the integration capabilities, you can easily double your local SEO performance with Synup.

counter_text_2: 20% of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year

section_2_heading: How Synup’s Expansive Local Marketing Solutions Compare to Zoho Publish
section_2_summary: While ZohoPublish only manages listings across 8 sites, Synup offers a complete solution that gives you visibility across a wide range of local as well as niche industry-specific listing sites. Here's how Synup outshines ZohoPublish:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Unlike ZohoPublish's limited integrations, Synup offers automated listing updates and syncs across 60+ discovery sites, ensuring your business is visible and accurately represented on all major platforms.
section_2_slider_2_summary: While ZohoPublish lacks local SEO analytics tools, Synup provides in-depth listing performance analytics and local rank-tracking tools. It leaves you with insights you can use to better optimize your SEO efforts and rank better in local.
section_2_step_3_summary: Synup's reputation management capabilities go beyond ZohoPublish's basic review response feature. Our platform helps you acquire more positive reviews through seamless CRM and POS system integrations, boosting your online presence and credibility. ZohoPublish also doesn’t offer AI support or automation for reviews, where Synup shines again.
section_2_slider_4_heading: Local Content Management and AI Support
section_2_slider_4_summary: ZohoPublish doesn't offer store pages or local content management features, but Synup provides menu integration, product/service integration, and AI-powered support, ensuring your local content is always in sync with your customer’s needs.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE-BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why You Should Choose Synup Over ZohoPublish
why_choose_tab_desc_1: Synup offers superior integration capabilities, ensuring a seamless connection with various platforms, including your CRM, POS systems, and more, streamlining your local marketing efforts.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Unlike ZohoPublish, Synup provides handy automation for managing reviews, running local campaigns, and updating listings seamlessly, saving you valuable time and effort.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Synup's platform is designed with a user-centric approach, connecting seamlessly across different aspects of your local marketing needs and providing a solution you can implement effortlessly.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Pinnacle of Digital Mastery
why_choose_content_summary: Transform Your Business with Synup – Beyond Comparison, Beyond Expectation.

Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
